scripts.typegen: npm run extract --workspace=studio && npm run typegen --workspace=studio
scripts.studio:deploy: npm run typegen && npm run deploy --workspace=studio -- --verbose
scripts.deploy:all: npm run sync && npm run deploy --workspace=studio -- --verbose
scripts.log: npm run sync && git add . && git commit -m "Progress Update" && echo Progress documented and saved.
scripts.archive-all: npm run sync && npm run log-session && npm run studio:deploy && git add . && git commit -m 'Archival Sync & Deploy' && git push
